sizing_rule.note: Position size calculated such that worst-case loss is predetermined and controlled before entry, allowing trader to operate near optimal f curve. Specific formula and numerical parameters not provided in excerpt. Applicable to derivative instruments with defined maximum loss (e.g., options).

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be predetermined to limit maximum loss to a known worst-case amount in advance, allowing traders to stay closer to the optimal f curve by controlling the largest possible loss.
